data.name: VALIDATION_GENERAL
data.value: One or more validation errors occurred.

data.name: VALIDATION_COLLECTION_REQUIRED
data.value: At least one item is required.

data.name: VALIDATION_NUMBER_GREATER_THAN_ZERO_REQUIRED
data.value: Value must be greater than zero.

data.name: VALIDATION_MAXIMUM_LENGTH_EXCEEDED
data.value: Value exceeds the maximum allowed length.

data.name: VALIDATION_MINIMUM_LENGTH_NOT_MET
data.value: Value does not meet the minimum required length.

data.name: OPENING_HOURS_NOT_FOUND
data.value: Opening hours for {0} do not exist.

data.name: ADDRESS_STREET_LENGTH_EXCEEDED
data.value: Street exceeds the maximum allowed length.

data.name: ADDRESS_CITY_LENGTH_EXCEEDED
data.value: City exceeds the maximum allowed length.

data.name: ADDRESS_REGION_LENGTH_EXCEEDED
data.value: Region exceeds the maximum allowed length.

data.name: ADDRESS_POSTAL_CODE_LENGTH_EXCEEDED
data.value: Postal code exceeds the maximum allowed length.

data.name: DATE_RANGE_INVALID
data.value: Start date must be before end date.

data.name: EMAIL_INVALID_FORMAT
data.value: '{0}' is not a valid email address.

data.name: GEOLOCATION_INVALID_LATITUDE
data.value: Latitude must be between -90 and 90 degrees. Received: {0}.

data.name: GEOLOCATION_INVALID_LONGITUDE
data.value: Longitude must be between -180 and 180 degrees. Received: {0}.

data.name: MONEY_INVALID_CURRENCY_FORMAT
data.value: Currency must be a 3-letter ISO code.

data.name: PHONENUMBER_INVALID_FORMAT
data.value: '{0}' is not a valid phone number.

data.name: RATING_OUT_OF_RANGE
data.value: Rating must be between {0} and {1}, and max rating must be greater than or equal to min rating.

data.name: RATING_POSITIVE_REQUIRED
data.value: Rating must be a positive integer.

data.name: TIME_RANGE_INVALID
data.value: Start time must be before end time.

data.name: ATTRACTION_NOT_FOUND
data.value: Attraction with ID {0} does not exist.

data.name: ATTRACTION_NEGATIVE_DISPLAY_ORDER
data.value: Attraction display order cannot be negative.

data.name: ATTRACTION_LOCALIZED_CONTENT_NOT_FOUND
data.value: Attraction localized content does not exist.

data.name: ATTRACTION_LOCATION_DESCRIPTION_LENGTH_EXCEEDED
data.value: Attraction location description length cannot exceed {0}.

data.name: CITY_NOT_FOUND
data.value: City with ID {0} does not exist.

data.name: CITY_NEGATIVE_DISPLAY_ORDER
data.value: City display order cannot be negative.

data.name: CITY_LOCALIZED_CONTENT_NOT_FOUND
data.value: City localized content does not exist.

data.name: REPORT_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The content report with ID {0} does not exist.

data.name: REPORT_CANNOT_BE_RESOLVED
data.value: Either reason or action must be provided, but not both.

data.name: REPORT_CANNOT_BE_REVIEWED
data.value: Only pending or under-review reports can be reviewed.

data.name: REPORT_CANNOT_BE_MARKED_UNDER_REVIEW
data.value: Only pending reports can be marked as under review.

data.name: REVIEW_NOT_FOUND
data.value: Review with ID {0} was not found.

data.name: REVIEW_TITLE_EXCEEDED_LENGTH
data.value: Review title exceeds the maximum allowed length.

data.name: REVIEW_CONTENT_EXCEEDED_LENGTH
data.value: Review content exceeds the maximum allowed length.

data.name: REVIEW_USER_ALREADY_REVIEWED_SITE
data.value: User has already reviewed this site.

data.name: REVIEW_UNAUTHORIZED
data.value: You are not authorized to perform this action.

data.name: SITE_NOT_FOUND
data.value: Site with ID {0} does not exist.

data.name: NEAREST_TRANSPORTATION_NAME_REQUIRED
data.value: Nearest transportation name cannot be empty.

data.name: SITE_INVALID_FACILITY_TYPE
data.value: One or more provided facility types are invalid.

data.name: SITE_FACILITY_ALREADY_EXISTS
data.value: A facility with the same name already exists for this site.

data.name: SITE_CONTACT_PHONE_REQUIRED
data.value: Site contact phone cannot be empty.

data.name: SITE_IMAGE_EXCEEDED_LENGTH
data.value: Site image URL cannot exceed the maximum length.

data.name: SITE_NEGATIVE_DISPLAY_ORDER
data.value: Site display order cannot be negative.

data.name: SITE_LOCALIZED_CONTENT_NOT_FOUND
data.value: Site localized content does not exist.

data.name: FACILITY_LOCALIZED_CONTENT_NOT_FOUND
data.value: Facility localized content does not exist.

data.name: NEAREST_TRANSPORTATION_LOCALIZED_CONTENT_NOT_FOUND
data.value: Nearest transportation localized content does not exist.

data.name: SITE_NEAREST_TRANSPORTATION_NOT_FOUND
data.value: Site nearest transportation does not exist.

data.name: SITE_NEAREST_TRANSPORTATION_DUPLICATE_LOCATION
data.value: A nearest transportation with the same location already exists for this site.

data.name: SPONSOR_NOT_FOUND
data.value: Sponsor with ID {0} does not exist.

data.name: SPONSOR_OFFER_NOT_FOUND
data.value: Offer with ID {0} does not exist.

data.name: SPONSOR_DISCOUNT_REQUIRED
data.value: Either discount amount or percentage must be provided.

data.name: SPONSOR_DISCOUNT_PCT_INVALID
data.value: Discount percentage must be between 0 and 100.

data.name: SPONSOR_EXPIRED_CONTRACT
data.value: Cannot activate sponsor with expired contract.

data.name: SPONSOR_OFFER_MAX_REDEMPTIONS_REACHED
data.value: Maximum redemptions reached for this offer.

data.name: SPONSOR_IMG_URL_REQUIRED
data.value: Sponsor image URL cannot be empty.

data.name: SPONSOR_EXCEEDED_IMAGE_LENGTH
data.value: Sponsor image length exceeds the maximum allowed.

data.name: SPONSOR_NEGATIVE_DISPLAY_ORDER
data.value: Sponsor display order cannot be negative.

data.name: SPONSOR_LOCALIZED_CONTENT_NOT_FOUND
data.value: Sponsor localized content does not exist.

data.name: SPONSOR_INVALID_DATE
data.value: Contract start date must be before end date.

data.name: SPONSOR_INVALID_EXTEND_DATE
data.value: New end date must be after current end date.

data.name: SPONSOR_INVALID_AVERAGE_RATING
data.value: Average rating must be between 0 and {0}.

data.name: SPONSOR_INVALID_NEW_DATE
data.value: New end date must be later than current end date.

data.name: USER_UNAUTHORIZED
data.value: The user with ID '{0}' is unauthorized.

data.name: FAVOURITE_NOT_FOUND
data.value: Favourite with ID '{0}' was not found.

data.name: TOURIST_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The user with ID '{0}' was not found.

data.name: USER_FIRST_NAME_REQUIRED
data.value: User first name cannot be empty.

data.name: USER_FIRST_NAME_LENGTH_EXCEEDED
data.value: User first name exceeds the maximum allowed length.

data.name: TOURIST_FIRST_NAME_REQUIRED
data.value: User first name cannot be empty.

data.name: TOURIST_FIRST_NAME_LENGTH_EXCEEDED
data.value: User first name exceeds the maximum allowed length.

data.name: USER_LAST_NAME_REQUIRED
data.value: User last name cannot be empty.

data.name: USER_LAST_NAME_LENGTH_EXCEEDED
data.value: User last name exceeds the maximum allowed length.

data.name: TOURIST_LAST_NAME_REQUIRED
data.value: User last name cannot be empty.

data.name: TOURIST_LAST_NAME_LENGTH_EXCEEDED
data.value: User last name exceeds the maximum allowed length.

data.name: USER_USERNAME_LENGTH_EXCEEDED
data.value: Username exceeds the maximum allowed length.

data.name: USER_PASSWORD_TOO_SHORT
data.value: Password does not meet the minimum required length.

data.name: USER_PASSWORD_TOO_LONG
data.value: Password exceeds the maximum allowed length.

data.name: REFRESH_TOKEN_REQUIRED
data.value: A valid refresh token is required to refresh the access token.

data.name: REFRESH_TOKEN_EXPIRATION_INVALID
data.value: The provided refresh token has expired.

data.name: EMAIL_ALREADY_IN_USE
data.value: User with this email already exists.

data.name: USERNAME_ALREADY_IN_USE
data.value: User with this username already exists.
